name: feat-ESE-21-7
title: Tilemap perf: grid growth with camera zoom until 40fps
description: Performance test: start with a small tilemap grid, grow it each frame while zooming the camera out to keep the full grid visible. Measure real-world FPS (not ECS tick rate). Record the grid size at which FPS drops below 40. Uses the dynamic ramp-up framework from task-ESE-0022.
demoDeliverable: Performance chart or terminal log showing grid size vs FPS, with the 40fps threshold marked.
